c.d: Availability of features that allow multiple users to work on the same document or project simultaneously.
The variety and effectiveness of communication methods offered within the app (e.g., chat, video conferencing, threaded conversations).
Tools for assigning tasks, setting deadlines, and tracking progress on collaborative projects.
The ease and security of sharing files and storing them within the app.
The number and quality of integrations with other popular apps and services.
How intuitive and easy to use the app is for team members.
The ability to customize workflows, dashboards, and notifications to fit the specific needs of the team.
Whether the app offers flexible pricing plans and can scale to accommodate the needs of growing teams.
